ds_des_source: Lange+2025, Figure 3 bottom-center panel (DES Y3 + KiDS-1000)
digitization_note: Color-based extraction from downloaded PNG (golden-yellow markers, RGB 240/200/0). Axis: log-x linear-y; y-axis shows rp*wp [h^-2 Mpc^2] and R*DeltaSigma [10^6 M_sun/pc]. Error bars from extent of colored pixels per bin. Script: data/lange2025_desi_dr1/digitize_figures.py. Accuracy ~5-10% (limited by pixel resolution ~0.5-1 data unit per pixel).
